mapper.insert: insert into workflows (id, name, status, created_at) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{status}, #{createdAt}) on conflict (id) do update set name = excluded.name, status = excluded.status, created_at = excluded.created_at

insert into workflow_tasks (workflow_id, task_id, name, position) values
(#{task.workflowId}, #{task.taskId}, #{task.name}, #{task.position})

insert into workflow_edges (workflow_id, source_task_id, target_task_id, position) values
(#{edge.workflowId}, #{edge.sourceTaskId}, #{edge.targetTaskId}, #{edge.position})
mapper.select: select id, name, status, created_at from workflows where id = #{workflowId} for update
select workflow_id, task_id, name, position from workflow_tasks where workflow_id = #{workflowId} order by position, task_id
select workflow_id, source_task_id, target_task_id, position from workflow_edges where workflow_id = #{workflowId} order by position, source_task_id, target_task_id
select id, name, status, created_at from workflows order by created_at, id limit #{limit}
